title: stream.config.load request

name.description: Saved-object name in this action namespace; do not assume names are shared by cursors, lists, and protocol configs.

additionalProperties.description: Value for a caller-defined signal alias key. Supply the real signal path or the action-supported expression for that alias.
additionalProperties.x-dynamic-contract: Each property key is an alias referenced by this action; each value resolves that alias to a signal path or supported expression.

signals.description: Signal-path list or alias-to-path/expression map. Expressions must reference aliases rather than nested paths.

clock.description: Action-specific clock input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

edge.description: Clock sampling edge. The schema default is authoritative; negedge often matches monitor semantics.

sample_point.description: Before/after observation point for posedge or dual sampling; it does not change the raw waveform range.

reset.description: Action-specific reset input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

vld.description: Signal path or expression defining the valid sampling condition for counter statistics.

rdy.description: Action-specific rdy input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

bp.description: Action-specific bp input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

sop.description: Action-specific sop input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

eop.description: Action-specific eop input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

data.description: Valid-ready or protocol payload signal path. Data-specific checks run only when it is supplied.

additionalProperties.description: Value for a caller-defined stream field name. Supply the signal path sampled for that field.
additionalProperties.x-dynamic-contract: Each property key is a stream field name and each value is its signal path.

beat_fields.description: Structured beat_fields configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

additionalProperties.description: Value for a caller-defined stream field name. Supply the signal path sampled for that field.
additionalProperties.x-dynamic-contract: Each property key is a stream field name and each value is its signal path.

packet_stable_fields.description: Structured packet_stable_fields configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

channel_id.description: Action-specific channel_id input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

channel_id_valid.description: Action-specific channel_id_valid input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

allow_interleaving.description: Action-specific allow_interleaving input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

description.description: Action-specific description input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

items.description: Structured streams configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

streams.description: Ordered streams entries. Each item must satisfy the declared item contract.

config.description: Structured config configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

config_path.description: Action-specific config_path input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

file.description: Action-specific file input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

mode.description: Action processing or return mode. Its legal values, default, and interactions are action-specific.

name.description: Saved-object name in this action namespace; do not assume names are shared by cursors, lists, and protocol configs.

additionalProperties.description: Value for a caller-defined signal alias key. Supply the real signal path or the action-supported expression for that alias.
additionalProperties.x-dynamic-contract: Each property key is an alias referenced by this action; each value resolves that alias to a signal path or supported expression.

sop.description: Action-specific sop input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

eop.description: Action-specific eop input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

data.description: Valid-ready or protocol payload signal path. Data-specific checks run only when it is supplied.

additionalProperties.description: Value for a caller-defined stream field name. Supply the signal path sampled for that field.
additionalProperties.x-dynamic-contract: Each property key is a stream field name and each value is its signal path.

beat_fields.description: Structured beat_fields configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

additionalProperties.description: Value for a caller-defined stream field name. Supply the signal path sampled for that field.
additionalProperties.x-dynamic-contract: Each property key is a stream field name and each value is its signal path.

packet_stable_fields.description: Structured packet_stable_fields configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

channel_id.description: Action-specific channel_id input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

channel_id_valid.description: Action-specific channel_id_valid input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

allow_interleaving.description: Action-specific allow_interleaving input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

description.description: Action-specific description input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

items.description: Structured streams configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

streams.description: Ordered streams entries. Each item must satisfy the declared item contract.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

description: Load and validate valid-ready stream configurations.
x-how_it_works: 把 stream 定义写入 stream manager。
x-when_to_use: 定义 valid/ready/data 类流接口。
x-arg_contract_notes: also one of: streams / config / config_path / file

do_not_use_when: 不要把本 action 用于 stream.config.list、stream.show 的业务目标；请改用列出的同域 action。

alternatives.when: 显示 stream 定义和摘要。

constraints: also one of: streams / config / config_path / file
